hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); case "$f" in *src/app/assets/css/*) jq -n "{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:\"PreToolUse\",permissionDecision:\"deny\",permissionDecisionReason:\"src/app/assets/css/** is precompiled vendor CSS — do not hand-edit. Edit the SCSS source under src/app/assets/sass/** instead.\"}}" ;; esac
